results.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY Promo Breaks Down Boomerang's Trick Arsenal
results.description: A new Spider-Man: Brand New Day promo finally spells out what Boomerang's "different powers" actually do, and the gimmick villain has a deeper bag of tricks than you'd think!

results.title: Brooks Nader’s Plunging ‘Baywatch’ Swimsuit Has All Eyes on Her Curves
results.description: Brooks Nader showed off her curves in her plunging, vibrant red “Baywatch” swimsuit. The “Love Thy Nader” star appeared in an Instagram video from the official page of Drama Club Fox posted on June 22. She is a cast member of the upcoming Fox reboot series and has been filming for it for months.
